content: Phase 1.1: Add EYES_ONE_PASS flag to app/config.py (default False)
Phase 1.2: Extend _GARMENT_OBJECT_SCHEMA with region.bbox / confidence / is_full_frame block
Phase 1.3: Extend SYSTEM_PROMPT with bbox-on-0..1000-grid instructions + one-shot example
Phase 1.5: Branch closet.py /analyze endpoint on settings.EYES_ONE_PASS
Phase 1.6: Lint clean + restart backend + smoke test the new code path against a CCP test image
Phase 1 review checkpoint with user before Phase 2
